name: Zucchini Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim a small slice off the top of each tomato, remove seeds, and drain cut side down on paper towels.
2. In a skillet, sautee zucchini, raisins, salt, and pepper until all liquid evaporates.
3. Add vinegar to the mixture and cook again until all liquid has evaporated. Spread out on a plate and chill.
4. Stir in pine nuts, spoon the chilled mixture into the tomatoes, and chill until ready to serve.
